title: Satisfying Ancient-Debris (Netherite) mining
body: Good day this package swaps both the texture and the sound from Netherrack to Amethyst. This makes it much more satisfying to mine ancient-debris/netherite. For perfection I also had to adjust the fire as well as the other nether ores and also nylium to the purple amethyst theme. Because it looks better, I added connected textures to the Ancient-Debris, Nether Gold Ore & Quartz Ore. Of course, the Ancient-Debris also has an exceptionally satisfying mining sound. If you have Optifine (or an alternative) installed, the Ancient-Debris is very obtrusive, so it is highlyrecommended not to play with brightness above 100%.
